programme.title: Margaret: The Rebel Princess
programme.desc: A look at the life of Princess Margaret, whose life and loves reflected the social and sexual revolution that transformed Britain during the 20th century.

programme.title: Margaret: The Rebel Princess
programme.desc: The early married life of Princess Margaret and her husband Anthony Armstrong-Jones in the 1960s, as major social changes take place in Britain.

programme.title: Downton Abbey on Masterpiece
programme.desc: As he grows into his role as heir, Matthew brings out the rivalry between sisters Mary and Edith; servants Thomas and O'Brien scheme against Bates.

programme.title: Antiques Roadshow
programme.desc: A group of Ayn Rand-inscribed books; Edward Borein watercolor circa 1930; a 1931 Carnegie hero medal; a visit to Crab Tree Farm.

programme.title: Finding Your Roots With Henry Louis Gates, Jr.
programme.desc: Exploring the ancestry of actress Sharon Stone and model Chrissy Teigen includes traveling across Europe and Thailand.

programme.title: Arthur
programme.sub-title: Listen Up!; Arthur's New Old Vacation
programme.desc: Muffy helps Francine deal with the death of her Bubbe; Arthur and Buster try to make the family vacation more exciting.

programme.title: Odd Squad
programme.desc: The Mobile Unit tries to figure out who broke into Odd Squad's Top-Secret Security Facility to get the mega-computer; The Shadow tries to convince villains worldwide to join her Villain Network.

programme.title: Wild Kratts
programme.desc: Martin and Chris try to rescue a foal who is separated from his mother by a rogue wave.

programme.title: Weather Hunters
programme.desc: The Hunters find a stowaway in their picnic basket, a little furry dog.

programme.title: Lyla in the Loop
programme.sub-title: The Mystery Puzzle; The Stu Express
programme.desc: Liana and Lyla put together a puzzle with more than 1,000 pieces; Lyla and Luke construct a train using household materials.

programme.title: Carl the Collector
programme.sub-title: A Wiggle Waggle Worries; The Pine Cone Collection
programme.desc: Sheldon can't wait for Carl to play his favorite beach game; Lotta and her friends search for Lotta's lost blanket.

programme.title: Daniel Tiger's Neighborhood
programme.sub-title: The Lemonade Stand; Mad at the Beach
programme.desc: Daniel and Prince Wednesday make a lemonade stand together but disagree about how to hand out the lemonade; Daniel and Miss Elaina get mad when their sandcastle is knocked down by a wave.

programme.title: Phoebe & Jay
programme.desc: Phoebe, Jay and Lupe practice their fire safety plan when the fire inspector visits; Phoebe and Jay buy juice from Mr. Aguilar.

programme.title: Sesame Street
programme.desc: On a hot day, Abby creates a snowman to keep her and Elmo cool; when they return from finding decorations, their snowman has vanished.

programme.title: Work It Out Wombats!
programme.desc: Malik learns the key to a successful "Brother Day"; Zeke and Louisa wait tables at the Eat 'N Greet after Duffy sprains her ankle.

programme.title: Donkey Hodie
programme.desc: A noisy penguin interrupts band practice; the pals work together to win Gator's latest game show.

programme.title: Rosie's Rules
programme.desc: Rosie and Javi transport a watermelon to the park for the family picnic; Rosie builds a dino cave for Iggy.

programme.title: Elinor Wonders Why
